_comment: SECTOR CARDS - Visual/environmental settings for each space sector. Loaded by CardBuilder.java -> SectorCard.java. Fields: width/height/length (sector bounds in units), regulationCardGuid (links to Regulation card), ambientColor/fogColor/dustColor (RGBA), fogDensity, dustDensity, nebulaDesc (prefab + color), starsDesc, lightDescs (rotation quaternion + color + intensity), sunDescs (sun visual properties + position), requiredAssets (client asset bundles to preload). Each sector must have a paired Regulation card.
